resources.string: No customers found. Add a customer.
No customers found. Add a customer.
Register a new source or consumer
Start delivering milk to see reports here
Your digital dairy khata. Let\'s learn how to use it.
Add people you buy milk from (Sellers) or sell to (Buyers).
Every morning/evening, enter liters here. It automatically calculates the bill.
Check balances, payment history, and share professional PDF receipts.

Dodhi is a premium dairy management suite designed to modernize traditional milk supply chains. Built for precision and ease, it empowers milkmen to manage their business with professional digital khata, real-time analytics, and secure history tracking.
Visit fixare.studio for more premium experiences.
Share or save a JSON backup of all data
Restore database from a JSON backup file
Selling Mode: You sell milk to this buyer and receive payments.
Buying Mode: You buy milk from this seller/source and pay them.
Price per liter of milk (e.g., 180 Rs.)
Standard liters delivered or received daily (e.g., 5.0 L)

string-array.name: reminder_titles
string-array.item: Honest Sustenance! 🌟
Evening Tea Time! ☕🥛
A Friendly Reminder! 😊
Ledger & Integrity! 📝✨
Childhood Joy! 🪁
The Gift of Milk! 🥛🎁
Evening Warmth! 🌅
White Gold! 🥛✨
Hard Worker\'s Pride! 💪
Tea and Friendship! ☕🤝
No More Paper! 📱
Peace of Mind! 🕊️
Keep it Clean! ✨
Sustaining the Nation! 🚜
Quick Check! ⏱️
Daily Achievement! 🏆
Pure Livelihood! 🌸
The Village Heartbeat! 🌾
Joyful Accounting! 😄
Digital Ledger! ⚡
True Honesty! 🌟
Sweet Tea! ☕🍬
Sunset Reflection! 🌌
Healthy Growth! 🥛🌱
The Way of Success! 🔑
Reliable Partner! 🤝
Fresh Start Tomorrow! ☀️
Inner Child Peace! 🪁
Colloquial Truth! 📜
Milk and Butter! 🧈
Every Litre Counts! 🥛
Honest Bookkeeper! 📝
Tea Time Peace! ☕
Proud Milkman! 🥛👑
Smart Business! 💡
Fields and Farms! 🚜
Evening Blessing! 🌸
No Forgotten Litres! 🥛❌
Bright Future! ✨
True Service! 🤝
Purity and Pride! 🌟
Easy Bookkeeping! 📱
Daily Milestone! 🏁
Heart of the Home! 🏠
Honest Profits! 💰
Blessing in Sustenance! 🕊️
The 5 PM Bell! 🔔
Always on Time! ⏰
Ledger Harmony! 🎼
Parchi Ready! 📄
Clear Mind! 🧘
Golden Rule! 🔑

string-array.name: reminder_messages
string-array.item: Time to fill today\'s ledger. Earning a clean livelihood is a beautiful blessing.
Relax with a cup of tea, but remember to record today\'s milk ledger first!
Your hard work brings smiles (and tea) to many homes! Please record today\'s entries.
Clean bookkeeping makes long friendships. Take a second to enter today\'s records.
Let\'s make bookkeeping as simple and joyful as flying a kite. Fill today\'s records!
You bring nourishment and health to families every single day. Let\'s log today\'s records.
As the sun sets, take a quick moment to update your digital register.
Milk is white gold, and you are its guardian! Log today\'s collection now.
Earning honestly is a true badge of honor. Keep your ledger accurate today!
A good cup of tea depends on good milk, and good business depends on clean accounts.
Ditch the old diaries and keep your records safe in your pocket. Tap to log.
Sleeping is easier when your ledger is clean and complete. Enter today\'s details.
A clean ledger means long and healthy customer relationships. Update today\'s entry.
Your hard work keeps the community healthy and strong. Log today\'s records.
It takes less than 30 seconds to record your daily run. Tap to log now.
Another productive day is almost over! Complete your records to wrap it up.
Your work is pure and blessed. Keep your accounting just as pure.
From green fields to the customer\'s stove, your journey is vital. Log today\'s run.
Smiling through the hard work makes the day fly. Let\'s update your records!
Keep your business modern and reliable. Tap to write today\'s entries.
Honesty brings blessings to your home and shop. Log today\'s deliveries.
Every cup of tea in town has a bit of your sweat and dedication. Fill the ledger.
The stars are coming out. Take a brief moment to finish today\'s bookkeeping.
Providing milk is helping children grow strong. Record your valuable work.
An accurate ledger is the first step toward a prosperous business. Write today\'s entries.
Your customers trust your word and your milk. Log today\'s ledger to match.
Clear today\'s work today so you can start tomorrow fresh and unburdened.
Keep your mind free from worry by completing your accounting now.
Clear accounts make long friendships. Don\'t forget to enter today\'s ledger.
Your hard work yields sweet butter and cream. Write your records now.
Small actions create great results. Make sure every litre is written down.
Keep your standards high and your ledger updated. Log today\'s data.
Enjoy your evening tea with a peaceful mind. Complete your khata entries.
Be proud of the nourishment you deliver. Keep your records up to date.
Work smart, live well. Use your app to record today\'s transactions.
You bridge the gap between fresh farms and busy towns. Log today\'s collection.
May your business grow and your health stay strong. Log today\'s details.
Memory fades, but the digital ledger stays forever. Tap to update.
Each logged day brings you closer to organized success. Update today.
Serving your community with pure milk is noble. Complete today\'s run.
Purity in milk, purity in book-keeping. Fill in today\'s ledger.
No more pens lost in the mud. Just tap and save today\'s entries.
Finish today\'s duties completely before resting. Log your milk run.
Without you, breakfast doesn\'t start. Log your entries now.
Accurate calculations build trust and profits. Update your ledger.
May Allah bless your hard work and pure earnings. Log today\'s records.
It\'s 5:00 PM! Time to record today\'s milk ledger. Don\'t forget!
Just like your morning deliveries, keep your accounting punctual.
Keep your business flowing smoothly by logging daily entries.
Log today\'s entries so you can share beautiful digital parchis anytime.
Close your business day with a clean, fully logged register.
Log your daily milk entries on the same day to avoid errors. Tap here.
